meaning: n.提供(赛马等)内幕消息的人
examples: Days later, Dozier was rescued by an Italian SWAT team, after a tipster led them to his location.
The animal oracle predictions for the World Cup have begun, with host nation Brazil getting a vote of confidence from its chosen turtle tipster.
Dan Moldea, author of "The Hoffa Wars, " said the tipster, a former gambler, contacted him March 30.
However, this past August, the feds got involved after a tipster (former employee) turned on Butler and his tactics.
As of this time, FBI agents investigating the claims have found no evidence whatsoever that supports the original tipster allegation.
